items.title: Deal with US not imminent, Iran says
items.dek: The Iranian foreign minister's comments come after the US secretary of state said an agreement could be announced on Monday.
items.body: The Iranian foreign minister's comments come after the US secretary of state said an agreement could be announced on Monday.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: ‘I love migrants’: One Nation MP Jason Virgo breaks down during maiden speech in South Australia parliament
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Oil prices slide on hopes of US-Iran peace deal
items.dek: Trump said on Saturday that an agreement would include the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, without giving further details.
items.body: Trump said on Saturday that an agreement would include the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, without giving further details.
items.author: IriLine Desk
